notes: Iter#71 NEW AXIS: VPVR POC reversion gated by put-call OI pressure proxy.
OPTIONS-DATA-MISSING per data/manifest.txt — PCR proxy = taker_buy_share (buy-aggressive volume fraction) computed from Binance USD-M 30m klines and aggregated to 8h.
taker_buy_share ↑ → call-side pressure (contrarian short bias); taker_buy_share ↓ → put-side pressure (contrarian long bias).
Distinct from existing vpvr_options_iv_termstructure_4h_20260715 and vpvr_options_iv_skew_1d_20260713 by (a) 8h timeframe, (b) PCR-pressure proxy vs IV-term / skew, (c) POC-anchored entry zone.
Primary timeframe 8h matches campaign 1m/15m/4h focus; 8h aligns naturally with funding cadence.
